chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 206 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA 886/2024 (s/a) 3. For hearing of main case. 24.04.2025. Petitioner No.9 Sajjad Hussain present in person. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General Sindh. *********** Learned Additional Advocate General Sindh files statement on behalf of respondent No.6, taken on record. Petitioner No.9 Sajjad Hussain present in person and submits that the case has been challaned and the petitioners are facing trial before trial Court. He further submits that they will file proper application under section 265-K Cr.P.C before trial Court for redressal of their grievance. However, he as well as co-petitioners does not wish to press this petition, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PA
